narrative:
DRIVER
USD leads D1+H4 CSM at 100 in a Risk-Off High regime, with hawkish Fed repricing and collapsing copper down 4.2% and silver down 9.6% stripping commodity-linked bids entirely. USDCAD is the primary expression — H4 CSM divergence flags CAD accelerating to 55 vs D1's 33, USDCAD H4 momentum at 70 with D1 at 59 both rising, and USDCHF confirms USD strength with H4 strong buy at +5 and 1212 H4 at 74. AUD is the critical divergence: D1 CSM at 65 vs H4 at 26 is a 39-point fade, meaning AUDUSD longs built on D1 bias are now offside intraday.

MOMENTUM
Gaining: USDCAD CMP 60, D1 59 rising and H4 70 steady — full-stack alignment
Fading: EURUSD CMP 39 H4 16 collapsing, GBPUSD CMP 39 H4 19 collapsing, NZDUSD CMP 46 H4 22 fading hard

WATCH
UK political uncertainty headline escalation hits GBPUSD directly — GBP is zero on both D1 and H4 CSM, triggering extension toward GBPJPY downside via the 0.91 correlation
Fed speaker repricing above current hawkish baseline pushes USDJPY through H4 buy signal at +4 with 1212 H4 at 78 accelerating
Copper breaking below 6.29 confirms AUDUSD D1-to-H4 fade with H4 CSM at 26 driving the pair lower immediately

themes.theme: GBP Weakness from UK Political Uncertainty
JPY Under Pressure Despite Solid Data
CAD Mixed Signals: Oil Support vs USD Strength
AUD Sharp Decline from Fed Repricing

key_observation: Strong USD bid driven by hawkish Fed repricing following better-than-expected industrial production data. Safe-haven flows evident in USD strength despite mixed equity signals. Major EM and commodity-linked currencies under pressure.
watch: Fed rate expectations, UK political developments, Treasury yield trajectory, potential BoJ intervention signals, EUR economic data calendar
